instruction: Building a rocket step by step (step 3 of 6). So far you've drawn: flame, body. Add the next part: polygon (points 48,40 80,40 64,12, fill #e63946) with id "nose-cone".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polygon id="flame" fill="#f97316" points="52,108 64,124 76,108" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#cccccc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x="48" y="40" width="32" height="70" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polygon id="flame" fill="#f97316" points="52,108 64,124 76,108" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#cccccc" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" x="48" y="40" width="32" height="70" />
  <polygon id="nose-cone" fill="#e63946" points="48,40 80,40 64,12" />
</svg>
